## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.13

### 🔔 Notifications
- Updates the X-Sense camera event blueprint so recording notifications are sent when the cached recording is ready.
- Marks imported v8 camera notification blueprints as stale so Home Assistant can replace them with the corrected v9 blueprint.

### 🎥 Cameras
- Normalizes camera charging state as a boolean so the Charging entity can report on/off instead of unknown when X-Sense sends standard charging values.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the v9 notification blueprint condition, stale v8 blueprint replacement, and camera charging normalization.
- Validates the integration with the full test suite.
